title: Outlined Dark
description: Just Another G-UI Pack That Makes Your G-UIs Dark, But Only Keeps The Black Outline For Maximum Visibility!
body: ## What Is This? This Is a Resource Pack That Contains `Dark Outlined G-UI`. This Darkens **Most** Of The G-UIs & Only Leaves The Outline Of The G-UIs, There Is Basically No Inside Or Filler Content For The G-UIs. This Can Greatly Help You To Have a View Behind The G-UI. (let me know through twitter if I have missed any important G-UIs) ## JOIN DISCORD TO GIVE FEEDBACK OR BUG REPORTS! ## FAQ 1. Why Does The Pack Show "Incompatible Version" & Is Red? - Ans: As Of Pack Version 1.0.0, Only 1.21+ Is Supported. Older Version Support Will Be Added Soon (depending on my mood and laziness). I'm Also Having An Issue Related To Adding List Of Version Support (for example 1.21-1.21.11), If Any Experienced Pack Maker Is Seeing This, Please Reach Out, Some Help Would Be Appreciated! ## Socials --- Outlined Light Coming Soon!
